# QUKO full reference

QUKO is a Spanish sports-technology company building an integrated performance system for canoeing, kayaking and rowing. The system serves athletes, coaches, clubs, federations, researchers and data analysts.

## Ecosystem

Kosoku captures precise motion, position and physiological data on the boat. Quko Live gives coaches immediate multi-athlete telemetry without requiring internet access. Quko Cloud processes each session into sport-specific analysis, comparisons, visual review, reports and shareable insight.

## Kosoku

Kosoku is an on-boat performance sensor with 100 Hz motion capture, 10 Hz dual-band positioning, a live transmission range of approximately 150 metres and a training battery life of approximately five hours. It records acceleration, rotation, route, speed, stroke metrics and compatible heart-rate information. It connects with Quko Live, Quko Cloud, Garmin devices, heart-rate monitors, paddle sensors and start systems.

## Quko Live

Quko Live monitors up to nine athletes from one Android interface. It provides live speed, acceleration, stroke frequency, heart rate, timing, laps and summary values. Its local wireless connection does not require mobile coverage or internet access.

## Quko Cloud

Quko Cloud guides users from Kosoku file upload and start selection to individual or comparative analysis. Available views include interactive charts, tables, configurable splits, boat movement, pacing, physiological context, 3D replay, synchronized video and mechanical analysis. Users can share temporary links and export PDF, JSON, FIT or TCX files.

The platform includes an AI-assisted analyst and secure connectivity for supported external AI assistants. Researchers and developers can use structured exports and an authenticated REST API. Role-based workflows support athletes, coaches, institutions and independent users.

## Engineering capabilities

QUKO works across sensor electronics, embedded firmware, positioning, wireless communications, live telemetry, cloud platforms, signal processing, sports analytics, APIs and secure AI integration. The company also develops tailored measurement systems when a performance or research requirement needs a custom approach.

## Commercial contact

Products are configured for individual, team and institutional programmes. Public prices are not listed. Request a demonstration or tailored proposal at https://quko.es/contact/.
